title: tt --version
description: §19 R06 — the version string `tt --version` prints (commander's plain single-line output), the SAME date/build version the GUI Settings → Software Update view shows. A stamped release is `YYYY.M.D` with an optional same-day build suffix `.N` (month/day NOT zero-padded, e.g. `2026.6.27` or `2026.6.27.2`); an unstamped local/dev build prints the deterministic `0.0.0-dev` sentinel. A non-date value (e.g. the old hardcoded `1.0.0`) fails validation.

oneOf.description: A stamped release version: YYYY.M.D[.N], not zero-padded.
The deterministic, offline dev sentinel an unstamped build carries.
